channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Laos Cave Rescue Workers Report 'Knocking Sound' in Search for Last Two Missing People
item.description: Rescue workers searching flooded caves in Laos reported hearing a knocking sound from inside the system as they tried to extricate two people.

item.title: Meteor explodes off Massachusetts coast, producing loud boom
item.description: NASA reported that the meteor's breakup released energy equivalent to roughly 300 tons of TNT.

item.title: Suspected WWII bomb detonates in Indonesia, killing five
item.description: A suspected World War II-era shell exploded beneath a house, killing five people and injuring nearly 20, police stated Monday.

item.title: WATCH: Hundreds detained in violent unrest after Champions League victory
item.description: Fans of Paris Saint-Germain celebrated a major win before street chaos in France led to hundreds of arrests for rioting and vandalism.
